title: Health Bars
description: Replaces hearts, armor and food with a bar
body:
# HEALTH BARS
## EN

Do you want a more modern interface? Health Bars replace hearts, armor, and food with clean, elegant visual bars. Ideal for those who prefer a minimalist aesthetic without losing sight of key HUD information.

- Life is represented with a red bar
- The armor is represented with a blue
- Food is represented by an orange
- The water bubble is represented by a blue cube with round edges.
- The pet's life is represented by a light orange cube
- And More

  By @d_de_diego_d

________________________________________________________________________________________________

# ES

¿Quieres una interfaz más moderna? Health Bars reemplaza los corazones, la armadura y la comida por barras visuales claras y elegantes. Ideal para quienes prefieren una estética minimalista sin perder de vista la información clave del HUD.


- La vida se representa con una barra roja
- La armadura se representa con una azul
- La comida se representa con una naranja
- La burbuja de agua se representa con un cubo azul con los bordes redondos
- La vida de la mascota se representa con un cubo naranja claro

By @d_de_diego_d
